title: Tahini Bao
description: A sweet and indulgent twist on traditional bao, filled with a creamy tahini filling.
instructions: Roll out bao dough to 1/4-inch thickness.
Cut out circles using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place dough circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush tops with egg wash for a golden glaze.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Meanwhile, mix tahini paste and granulated sugar in a bowl until smooth.
Once bao is ready, let cool for 2-3 minutes.
Split bao in half horizontally and fill with tahini paste.
Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
